title: Measurement Category
description: Coarse-grained classification of vendor-defined metrics. Buyers query by category for cross-vendor discovery (e.g., 'I need attention measurement from any vendor') because vendors do not converge on `metric_name` strings before standardization. Categories track the established measurement-vendor space (IAB Attention Task Force, MRC viewability, GARM/Ad Net Zero emissions, brand-lift / incrementality / audience verticals).
